query_title: The Discreet Charm of the Bourgeoisie

recommendations.title: Un Chien Andalou
recommendations.overview: Un Chien Andalou is an European avant-garde surrealist film, a collaboration between director Luis Buñuel and Salvador Dali.

recommendations.title: The Exterminating Angel
recommendations.overview: After a lavish dinner party, the guests find themselves unable to depart... and, over the next few days, all of their elaborate societal pretenses and façades deteriorate as they are reduced to living like animals.

recommendations.title: L'Âge d'or

recommendations.title: Él
recommendations.overview: Gloria encounters Francisco, a man whose social veneer betrays a truer self burrowed underneath.

recommendations.title: Nazarín
recommendations.overview: A Catholic priest in a poor community lives a charitable life in accordance with his religious principles, but others do not return the favor.

recommendations.title: The Phantom of Liberty
recommendations.overview: This Surrealist film, with a title referencing the Communist Manifesto, strings together short incidents based on the life of director Luis Buñuel. Presented as chance encounters, these loosely related, intersecting situations, all without a consiste

recommendations.title: The Criminal Life of Archibaldo de la Cruz
recommendations.overview: A bizarre black comedy about a man whose overwhelming ambition in life is to be a renowned serial killer of women, and will stop at nothing to achieve it - but not everything goes according to plan...

recommendations.title: The Young and the Damned
recommendations.overview: A group of juvenile delinquents live a violent life in the infamous slums of Mexico City; among them Pedro, whose morality is gradually corrupted and destroyed by the others.

recommendations.title: Belle de Jour
recommendations.overview: Beautiful young housewife Séverine Serizy cannot reconcile her masochistic fantasies with her everyday life alongside dutiful husband Pierre. When her lovestruck friend Henri mentions a secretive high-class brothel run by Madame Anais, Séverine begin

recommendations.title: Simon of the Desert
recommendations.overview: Simon, a deeply religious man living in the 4th century, wants to be nearer to God so he climbs a column. The Devil wants him come down to Earth and is trying to seduce him.
